rulings.Case Title: MCLAUGHLIN FAMILY ASSOCIATES, LP ET AL VS. MAXIMUS 620 OWNER, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday January 4, 2019 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT MCLAUGHLIN FAMILY ASSOCIATES, LP, EJC FOLSOM LLC DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT continued to February 1, 2019 for supplemental briefing. No later than January 18, 2019 cross-complainant shall file a supplemental brief limited to: (1) citation (with a pin cite where necessary) to cases addressing partial performance under factual circumstances similar to the case at bar, i.e. the clause of the agreement pursuant to which improvements are made is optional/not required to be performed by the contract such as section 4.3. Only citation without any argument shall be provided. If any argument is included, the supplemental brief will be stricken in its entirety. If no such cases can be cited, response should state "N/A"; (2) facts (who, to whom, when, in what manner, under what circumstances) that could be alleged in good faith regarding the following assertion in paragraph 24: "McLauhlin requested, and 620 Folsom agreed, that signatures would be exchanged after the holiday; only proposed facts shall be stated. If no facts could be alleged in good faith, the brief should state "No facts." No argument is authorized. If any argument is included, the supplemental brief will be stricken in its entirety; and (3) facts that could be alleged in good faith showing what was the parties' understanding of the term "after the holiday," i.e. what date is that, e.g. January 2, 2018 or March 22, 2018 or December 17, 2018. If no facts could be alleged in good faith, the brief should state "No facts." No argument is authorized. If any argument is included, the supplemental brief will be stricken in its entirety. By no later than January 25, 2019 Cross-Defendant may file a supplemental brief addressing only Cross-Complainant's response to the first point listed above. Response should be limited to citations (with pin cites where appropriate) to cases stating for the opposition proposition to any cases cited by the Cross-Complainant. Only citation without any argument shall be provided. If any argument is included, the supplemental brief will be stricken in its entirety. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DEVLIN/MCNALLEY CONSTRUCTION, INC. VS. MISSION HUB, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Devlin Mcnallys Construction Inc.S Motion For Leave To Amend Initial Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday January 4, 2019 line 2. PLAINTIFF DEVLIN/MCNALLEY CONSTRUCTION, INC. Notice Of Motion And Devlin Mcnallys Construction Inc.S Motion For Leave To Amend Initial Complaint GRANTED, First Amended Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. The Court does not make any rulings as to the sufficiency, timeliness or applicability of the "relation back" doctrine. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MARK GE ZHANG ET AL VS. YENEFER FERNANDO AGUILAR ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday January 4, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT YENEFER AGUILAR, DILIA CASTRO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Notice of Termination of Tenancy is fatally defective as it does not comply with CC 1946.1(h). See Gov't Code 7060(d). = (501/CFH)
